resources.string: To fully install this app, we need to install data files.
For installing data files, Bazaar needs to access your storage directory.

"Earn points with every purchase of Bazaar's games and apps in the Loyalty club. At special events, take advantage of special offers and increase your score. Turn your points into a discount code and in-app products and other prizes available at the Loyalty Club."
"You earn points by purchasing games and apps that use Bazaar's payment service. In special events, you can earn up to 5 times more points from selected games and apps."

Turn your points into discount codes and in-app products like special characters, coins and diamonds. You can also use your points to buy tickets to lotteries held on special occasions. Expect more diverse prizes in Bazaar.

There are 4 levels in the Loyalty Club. By collecting more points, you go to a higher level, which makes you get more points for each purchase. Once you reach a level, you will maintain that level this year and next.
"There isn't any application on your device for doing this operation."
No Comment Has Been Posted Yet
All your apps and games are updated
Your device does not have enough capacity for this app.
This app will be used by your operating system and cannot be run separately.
Sign in to use all features of this app.
Sign in to use all features of %s
Your selected apps and games will be downloaded daily and automatically within the specified time frame and with the designated internet usage.
By enabling automatic updates, you won’t miss the latest changes to the apps and games you want.
"With auto-update enabled, you won't miss the latest «%s» changes."
Create your own avatar in Bazaar and share it with your friends.
To unlock each medal, complete its mission.
If deactivated, applications will be downloaded simultaneously which may slow down your internet.
Your bank card must belong to one of the following banks
The phone number registered in your bank account and your Bazaar account must be the same
To ensure automatic updates function properly, please turn off battery optimization for the Bazaar app on your device.
Enter the correct answer to switch to Bazaar.
Your answer is incorrect. Try again.
"You are now logged out of Kids' Bazaar."
"Kids' Bazaar is a dedicated space for children, under parental control and supervision."
Bazaar Security Shield scans apps and notifies you of any potentially harmful behavior continuously and automatically.
"You'll get to see new features of this %s before anyone else, and you can leave the beta program whenever you like."
"By leaving the beta program, you will lose access to this %s's beta features."
You are a Beta Program User
"You'll be able to join the beta program for this %s once a spot opens up."
The beta program is currently full
Join the beta program to get early access to the latest features of this %s and help the developer improve it.
New features are still under development, so the beta version may be less stable.
If you leave this page, your purchase will be canceled.
By cancelling auto-renew, your subscription will not be renewed automatically. But, your subscription will remain active for current period.
Image displayed while the cast receiver is playing an ad
Current position is at the head of the live stream

"Make sure your device and the Cast device are on the same Wi-Fi network.
"Learn more
Learn more about how you can cast your content to other devices.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
What is a data file? This is a file that is necessary to save and install high quality games
Are you sure you want to delete the downloaded file?
Are you sure you want to delete the bookmark app?
The update size has been reduced from %1$s to %2$s.
Do you want to disable direct debit?
"It's necessary to install the application in order to edit a comment."
There is no active Discount code
There is no active Gift card
"By submitting your comments, you will help millions of Bazaar's users in choosing apps & games."
"You don't have rejected comment. By looking in un reviewed tab, you can review more apps and games."
"You have reviewed all of your apps. Install Bazaar's top games & apps and by rating them help millions of Bazaar's users."
You have reviewed all of your apps.
In order to access your approximate location (the city you live in) you have to activate it from Bazaar app settings on your phone.
In order to install application data files you have to activate storage permission from Bazaar settings on your phone.
To load data files, we require access storage permission.
There is no direct debit history.
Unable to connect to Bazaar servers.
"You don't have enough points to receive this award"
Sign in to use this app
There was an issue getting more details about this ad
Error while downloading the image file
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
"Your current period will end at %s and this subscription can't be renewed."

"Your current period will end at %s. As you have canceled auto-renewal of this subscription, your subscription won't be renewed and you will loose your access to this content. For activating auto-renewal feature, click on the button below."
Your current period will end at %s. At this time, it will be renewed automatically using balance of your wallet/account.
This version of Bazaar is not supported anymore, Please update to the new version.
"Unfortunately, No browser was found on your phone to open this link. Please download and install the latest version of Bazaar from CafeBazaar website. The website link: https://cafebazaar.ir"
These apps are harmful, remove them.
Trying to connect to your Bazaar Game Service
The application has encountered an unexpected error.
Some features in %1$s may not work properly without HMS Core, which is not installed on your device.
%1$s is unable to use HMS Core. Launch Optimizer (Phone Manager) or go to Settings, enable all permissions for %2$s (including auto-launch and secondary launch), and try again.
It appears that you have an unofficial version of HMS Core (%1$s) installed on your device. Please uninstall HMS Core from Settings and return to this app to install the official version.
Your In app purchase cannot be completed
Trying to connect to your Bazaar account
Trying to login to your Bazaar account
"Your subscription have ended at %s and this subscription can't be renewed."
Your subscription have ended at %s. In case you want to re-subscribe, click on the button bellow.
Increasing Bazaar wallet balance was successfully.
Installation failed! Do you want to try again?
Installation failed due to insufficient storage
Cannot install app, allow Bazaar to access your phone storage.
«%s» can not be installed on your phone.
Unable to update «%s». Uninstall the app from your phone and reinstall.
Unable to install «%s». Uninstall the app from your phone and reinstall.
Installation failed because of an unexpected error.
Installation failed because «%s» app is fundamentally incompatible with this device.
Installation failed because one or more of the APKs was invalid.
Installation failed because of storage issues.
«%s» has been successfully installed on your device.
Due to enhanced customization and in order to present location-based suggestions, we need to have access to your approximate location (the city you live in); do you authorize the access?
Due to enhanced customization and in order to present location-based suggestions, we need to have access to your approximate location (the city you live in)
In order to submit comment in \"%s\", please log into your Bazaar account.
In order to make in-app purchase in \"%s\", please log into your Bazaar account.
Please log in to your Bazaar account.
In order to receive this award, please log into your Bazaar account.
Do you want to logout your account?
In Loyalty Club, you can receive points with each purchase and use its benefits in apps and games.
In order to see loyalty club, please log into your Bazaar account.
Receive %1$d times point on %2$s when the subscription is automatically renewed
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Bazaar Security Shield has detected %1$s malicious apps.
In order to login, you need to enter your phone number.
Dear user In Bazaar new version, you can login with a mobile number. Your email-based account will be merged with your mobile number. To start the merging process, please enter your email:
From now on, you can enter Bazaar through this phone number. You don’t need email anymore.
Do you want to terminate all other sessions?
Do you want to terminate this session?
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
We need your permission to notify you about updates and show installation progress.
We need your permission to install apps and games from Bazaar.
In order to see your reviews, please log into your Bazaar account.
Enter 10 digits of the national code in a row without any dashes.
To activate direct debit through banking systems, it is necessary to enter the national code of the account holder.
Please enter your nickname. Your comments will be published with this name.
No description found on this video.
There is not enough storage available in your device, Please free up your storage.
This feature does not work in this version
Please rate this app first to post your comment
Shows what music is currently playing in UAMP
Tap here to open downloaded list
%s has been successfully installed on your device
%s and %d other apps has been successfully installed on your device
%s and %d other apps has been successfully installed on your device
The install confirmation of %s and %d other apps dismissed
To notify the completion of downloads and installations, we need your permission.
\"%1$s\" and %2$d other apps update are available.
%1$s and %2$d other apps update are available.
Tap here to open downloaded list
Waiting for OBB files install confirm
One-click download of best games with domestic payment
Checks apps & games automatically with Bazaar Security Shield
The payment request caller is not as same as its requester.
The payment request is called wrongly.
Allows an app to make a payment request and redirect the user to the Bazaar app, to process the payment.
Please install a browser in order to continue purchase.
"To inform you of the app developer's response, we need your permission."
To notify the completion of downloads and installations, we need your permission.
We require access to enable automatic downloads of updates at your specified time.
To inform you of updates, we need your permission.
To inform you of updates, we need your permission.
"It's necessary to install the application in order to write a comment."
"It's necessary to install the application in order to write a reply."

In order to make your purchase process from apps and games as easy as possible, you will be provided with a deposit amount. With this feature, you can buy up to your credit limit from Bazaar apps and games and pay the amount later.

"Bazaar’s credit service is a feature that has been provided to some users. Bazaar always has the rights to change the users covered by this feature at its discretion. After the credit expires or when the balance of this credit is not enough, you must settle your debt. Once settled, you will be able to use the same amount of Bazaar's credit service again. For now usage of this feature is free. However, in the future you may need to pay a subscription fee to use this service, in which case you will be notified of these changes."
I accept Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
I accept Terms of Service an d
By activating this option, if the selected quality is enabled, all videos will be displayed in that quality.
%1$s apps are downloaded and ready for install.
The amount of %s was added to your balance
Swipe up to go to the next Video
Allows an app to get the referrer data.
Do you want to delete your avatar?
By confirming this message, %1$s will be removed from the update all and auto update list. To return the app to the list, go to the Removed section at the bottom of this page.
By activating auto-renewal, in case of sufficient balance in your wallet/account, your subscription will be renewed automatically in due date.
Automatic subscription renewal is not active.
The reason you complain about the \"%s\"
Are you sure you want to restore %1$s deleted games and apps to the update list?
See the rules for leaving a comment
Download updated apps automatically at scheduled times.
You have not selected any app for auto-update.
Installation file of apps are stored in default Download folder of the device.This may cause low storage issues on your device.
Notify me when updates are available.
To enable game and app installation, we need access Install permission.
To deactivate the credit service, you have to settle your debt.
Your complaint will be addressed at the earliest opportunity.
Your comment is submitted and will be published after approval.
Are you sure you want to cancel the \"%s\" subscription? If so, it will no more automatically renew, and you can only use the service unitl (%s).
In order to see your subscriptions, please log into your Bazaar account.
Your NickName has been sent for comment
The selected badge is shown in the comments.

I have just installed Bazaar on my Android device. Bazaar is an application marketplace for Persian speaking Android users. Download is right now from http://www.cafebazaar.ir/download/bazaar.apk and enter the limitless world of Android apps!
You have not reviewed these apps.
You have not yet earned this badge.
You have not bookmark an app yet!
In order to see this page, please log into your Bazaar account.
"You didn't have bought any subscription yet."
Hooray! Everything is up to date!
The amount has been refunded to the user account.
You connect to an external service via Bazaar!
This version of Bazaar is not supported. Please update.
More compatibility with some Huawei devices
Added ability to forward and rewind the video with double tap gesture
Fixed some issues in latest downloads and upgradable apps screens
Fixed an issue which cause Bazaar to unexpectedly stop working
Enhancement in the user interface and functionality
Fixed an issue in showing correct percentage of download progress
Fixed some issues in the video live stream
Added ability to filter search results
Fixed some issues in the video live stream
Added ability to download the ad application while video watching
Improvement in user experience in search
Added new Bazaar update item on pages
Added ability to activate the direct debit feature in payment methods
Fixed an issue in in-app payment consumption on several devices
Added display of the total number of ads in video
Fixed ad application launch issue during watching a video
Added ability to download smaller volumes of apps in the update
Added ability to manage reviews on the myBazaar page
Added ability to show more review details on the application details page
Added ability to show application update details on the update page
Fixed an issue in the low space dialog on the bazaar loading page
Fixed an issue with the display of playback buttons during live video
Fixed an issue with the back button on the profile page
Fixed an issue in in-app payment
Fixed an issue with video and application history database
Added automatic payment, subscription purchase and other features on the payment subscription page
Changed user experience in credit increase
Fixed the problem of video screen blackout in some situations
Fixed an issue with vote on the Video details page
Added Capability to manage activated sessions and terminate them
Added related video suggestions and the next episode of the series on video page
Removed portrait mode on the video page
Fixed an issue with downloads when Bazaar is running in the background
Added the opening sequence pass button in the video play
Fixed some UI issues on video and app detail pages
Added the ability to play video on game and app pages
Added an item with the ability to play directly on the video page
Fixed an issue with not displaying credit on MyBazaar page
Fixed a problem displaying subtitle dialog on some devices
Fixed an issue in displaying subtitle and video quality selection in Android 11
Added the ability to request the application in the search
Added watch list tab in video
Fixed an issue displaying video comment responses
Improved search functionality on the app and video pages
Fixed an issue with video playback in the episode list
Added the ability to change the subtitle font size in the video player
Added the ability to save playback quality in video
Added the ability to receive and display Bazaar badges
Added the ability to view discount codes on the My wallet page
Added the ability to view and register gift cards on the My wallet page
Fixed an issue with the Terms and conditions and Privacy policy link on the onboarding page
Fixed a crash on the video page and in some cases
Redesigned part of the App details page
Added ability to create and customize the avatar
Added ability to reply to comments
Added ability to create and customize the avatar
Added ability to view apps and games story
Added ability to view downloaded apps in the main page
Fixed a bug in upgrading Bazaar on Android 6.0.1
Download applications information is now displayed as download size instead of progress
Fixed cancel notification problem in downloading apps
Fixed a crash in closing post comment dialog
Fixed a problem with user logouts
Fixed the problem of not showing the successful installation dialog in special circumstances on Android 11
The capability of removing the avatar
Showing loyalty club offers in app details
Some UI changes in upgradable apps tab and discount code page
Added capability of spending loyalty club points in app detail
Enhancement in the user interface and functionality
The installed applications from Bazaar can now be updated without requiring confirmation on Android 12 and above.
In the new version of Bazaar, you can see the results of checking by antiviruses in all programs.
Added new accessibility features to support individuals with visual impairments
Improvement in functionality of Bazaar Splash
Fixed some bugs and problems in Search and Splash
Fixed some bugs and problems in Downloaded Screen and Setting
Resolved issue preventing the installation of apps containing data on certain Android versions
Minor Issues Resolved related to comments, app updates, app details and search
Added App shortcuts for search and updates
Fixes some bugs in scheduled download
Added capability to grand install permission before download in android 14 and up
Enhanced the user interface and performance of the automatic update
Added beta features for specific users
Fixed MyBazaar links not working properly in specific scenarios
Fixed download getting stuck in preparation state and not being able to cancel
Fixed video resize issue when changing playback quality
Fixed an issue with the Install button in the search page under certain conditions
Redesigned third party app details for a cleaner, more modern look
AI Persian-translated app details for descriptions in other languages
Improved video playback and fixed the screen turning off while watching
Improve subtitle display in playing video
Added AI-generated summaries of reviews and comments to the app details page.
Added the ability to remove content from the continue watching list
Write and view reviews on Movies and TV Series‏
Added security shield with automatic and continuous protection capability
Added ability to search on the video tab
Added ability to disable updates for a specific application
Added ability to clear download history
Added ability to show ads in video player
Added ability to suggest related queries after search (Will be activated gradually)
Fix an issue in showing subtitle in some devices
Added ability to resume video from the position you watched before
Some changes in lists and main pages user interface
Fixed some issues in installing applications
Fixed some issues in showing subtitle and video quality in the video player
Added ability to enable Dark Mode in MyBazaar -> Setting
Some UI changes in the lists and search
Fixed an issue in showing update for the apps that are disabled by the user
Fixed an issue in app billing functionality in android 4.4 and some devices
Added ability to enable Dark Mode in MyBazaar -> Setting
Fixed an issue in-app billing in some devices
Added ability to like or dislike the videos
Changed payment design in landscape mode
Fixed some design related and functional issues in the video player and payment pages
Added ability to use discount code in payments
Fixed some design issues in dark mode
Added ability to submit the birthday and gender in the profile
Fixed an issue in initiating payment in some devices
Added ability to toggle between installed or not-installed apps and games in top chart screen
Some minor changes in the user interface
Added ability to select avatar for profile
Added ability to download and install bundle applications
Fixed some UI related issues in top charts
Added expansion pack (OBB) support for applications download and install
Fixed download stuck issue at some states
Added support for login with Bazaar in third party apps (Will be activated gradually)
Fixed some issues in the downloader
Fixed some issues in the video player
Added new information about the movie in the video details screen
Some UI changes in search screen
Fixed switching to the dark mode when the battery saving is activated
Added ability to use In-app storage capability for third-party applications
Fixed some UI issues and better compatibility with Smart TVs
Fixed dark theme system default issue
Fixed Bazaar suddenly close issue when navigating between some screens
Added ability to see coming soon videos information
Fixed some issues in the downloader
Changed some of the list items UI
Voice search is not available on your device.
You cannot vote on unpublished comments.
By installing and running this %s from Bazaar, the problem of increasing ping and not connecting will be solved.
We sent verification code via Email to %s.
Use various Bazaar’s payment services such as direct debit and wallet along with viewing your transaction history, subscriptions and discount codes.
No need for a banking portal
You will receive a credit amount.
Please enter your email address correctly.
Please enter your phone number correctly.

You have already rated this app:
